title: Junior Revenue Manager at Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Revenue Manager at Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
We at Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Revenue Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services:
Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kumarakom Lake Resort Holdings Services!
